title: Dangote Refinery Dismisses Shutdown Claims, maintains 50 million Litres PMS Daily Output … Reaffirms N699 Gantry Price as Marketers Lift Over 48 million Litres on Sunday …Blasts Fuel Importers for Spreading Falsehoods and Exploiting Nigerians - FinancialEDGE
description: Dangote Petroleum Refinery has categorically rejected a circulating report claiming the refinery is shutting down for maintenance, describing the story as false and misleading. In a statement released on Monday, the refinery emphasised that production remains ongoing, stable, and uninterrupted. “Dangote Petroleum Refinery continues to operate at scale and retains the capacity to supply between
html: Dangote Petroleum Refinery has categorically rejected a circulating report claiming the refinery is shutting down for maintenance, describing the story as false and misleading.
